{"query":"UPDATE produktionsAnlagenHistorie SET zeitintervallAnl = '1', einheitAnl = '1', einheitControlSys = '1', bemerkung = 'ccc ccc', gueltigVon = '01.03.2021', gueltigBis = '17.03.2021', startDate = '2021-03-01',endDate = '2021-03-17',startWeek = '',endWeek = '',ending = '0',note = 'ccc' WHERE iBdeType = '1' AND prdktHist_ID = '12'"}
